subraces.name: Varenic
subraces.description: River-valley people with a long history of trade and agriculture. Warm-toned skin, dark hair, strong family clans.

subraces.name: Caldari
subraces.description: Lean builds, scarfed faces, nomadic ancestry.

subraces.name: Aurelian
subraces.description: High elves of the radiant cities.

subraces.name: Vaelori
subraces.description: Wood elves of the deep forests.

races.name: Asteri
races.description: Star-touched humans born under rare celestial events.
